hero_tagline: "A day of unity and celebration for the African diaspora."

Carrer de Badajoz 115, 08018 Barcelona
Sant Martí · Barcelona

detail_tickets_sub:
Early Entry — from 13:00
Family & kid-friendly. Food, culture, and community vibes all afternoon.

Late Entry — from 21:00
Non-stop musicians & DJs, drinks until 02:00.

Tickets coming soon — register your interest.
program_intro: Join us for an all-day fair & party packed with good vibes, better beats, and a celebration of culture, community, and connection. Expect a DJ on deck, drinks flowing, and a dance floor ready for you and your crew.
program_sub: International food fair, music, and cultural celebration
performances_body: From live music and DJs to dance, visual art, and spoken word — Juneteenth Barcelona 2026 will feature a full day of performances celebrating Black creativity and culture. We are curating a diverse lineup of artists representing the African diaspora.
food_body: Four carefully selected food vendors will serve a rich variety of dishes from across Africa and the Americas — from West African street food to Caribbean classics and beyond. Cooked fresh on-site using Roots Gastro Club's commercial kitchen.
juneteenth_body_1: Juneteenth celebrations started in the USA but have expanded geographically with the movement of Black Americans to other countries. Celebrations abroad use the day to recognize freedom, liberation, and to celebrate the culture, achievements, and unity of the African diaspora.
juneteenth_body_2: As the population of Black Americans grows in Barcelona, celebrating Juneteenth provides a new opportunity for the community to ground itself, increase its visibility, and become better connected and integrated within Barcelona's African diaspora and the city as a whole.
venue_body: We are thrilled to partner with Martinho, the owner of Roots Gastro Club — a Black-owned creative space in the heart of Sant Martí. Martinho has been a warm, generous, and enthusiastic collaborator, and his passion for community is exactly why this space feels like home for Juneteenth Barcelona 2026.
venue_address:

08018 Barcelona
Sant Martí
register_sub: Volunteer, sponsor, perform, or simply attend. All are welcome.
